action: Use execute_windows_command to click the Run icon in the VS Code activity bar, select “Run Python File” in the GUI dropdown, targeting calculator_app.py.
fallback_action: Notify the user if running the Python file fails in the future.

recipe.steps: In Visual Studio Code, click the Run icon in the activity bar. Next, in the dropdown, select 'Run Python File' to execute calculator_app.py.
